action.reasoning: Observation: Latest training achieved new val AUC peak 0.7585@ep14 (higher than prior 0.7582) but test AUC 0.7554 (below overall best 0.7563 from iter10 h=896/e=128), clear overfitting post-peak (val drops to 0.74 while loss to 0.47), iter~56s with ~17min left. Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT solid (interaction embeds + per-skill output + masking + ES/clip/scheduler working); higher val shows capacity but gen gap from insufficient reg/hparams (embed too small for reps, LR/WD not optimal). Workspace train.py display truncated but executed fully this iter (no deprecated args). Decision: Fully rewrite all 3 files clean/complete (no truncation risk, full hparam ckpt save, robust ES/scheduler/gradclip/jsonl-only-logging, arg parsing, matching inference) with tuned params (embed=256 for richer skill-correct reps, h=768, d=0.5, lr=1.5e-4, wd=8e-5, bs=48, epochs=60, es_pat=15, sch_pat=5) to raise val peak + close gen gap for better test AUC; train then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
